originalTitle: Let's land Musk's rocket with RL
title: Porting Rocket Landing Environment to C with Box2D and PufferLib
summary: Worked on porting a seven-year-old rocket landing RL environment from Python to C using Box2D physics. Debugged coordinate system mismatches between rendering and physics, resolved joint attachment issues, and set up PufferLib training pipeline achieving 200k steps per second.
